title: xanthophyllum pubescens
intro: Xanthophyllum pubescens, also known as the hairy Xanthophyllum, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum pubescens include the potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as providing antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, Xanthophyllum pubescens is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
